findings.message: Malformed JSON in exec form. Commands starting with '[' should use valid JSON syntax with double quotes (e.g., ["cmd", "arg"] not ['cmd', 'arg'] or [cmd, arg]). Malformed JSON will be silently treated as shell form, leading to unexpected behavior.
